subsection.chapeau: 11 So in original. No subsec. (b) has been enacted. Upon request of the Government of Palau the President shall provide, on a nonreimbursable basis, appropriate technical assistance to the public auditor or special prosecutor. The assistance provided pursuant to this subsection for the first five years after the effective date of the Compact shall, upon the request of the Government of Palau, and to the extent personnel are available, include (but not be limited to) the full time services of—

paragraph.content: an auditor or accountant, as determined by the public auditor, for the office of public auditor; and
an attorney or investigator, as determined by the special prosecutor, for the office of special prosecutor.

note.heading: References in Text
note.p: For Oct. 1, 1994, as the effective date of the Compact, referred to in text, see Proc. No. 6726, Sept. 27, 1994, 59 F.R. 49777, set out as a note under section 1931 of this title.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly set out as a note under section 1681 of this title.
